title: endiandra hayesii
intro: Endiandra hayesii, also known as the Australian laurel, is a species of tree in the family Laurelaceae, native to the rainforests of Queensland, Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a valuable resource for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Endiandra hayesii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
